title: The Intelligence Organisations (Restriction of Rights) Act, 1985
full_text: The Intelligence Organisations (Restriction of Rights) Act, 1985 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198558 Act Number: 58 Enactment Date: 1985-09-06 Act Year: 1985 Short Title: The Intelligence Organisations (Restriction of Rights) Act, 1985 Long Title: An Act to provide for the restriction of certain rights conferred by Part III of the Constitution in their application to the members of certain organisations established by the Central Government for purposes of intelligence or counter-intelligence so as to ensure the proper discharge of their duties and the maintenance of discipline among them. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 09-11-1985 Notification: 9th December, 1985, vide notification No. S.O. 885(E), dated 9th December, 1985, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Intelligence Organisations (Restriction of Rights) Act, 1985 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Restrictions respecting right to form association, freedom of speech, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Penalty. Section 5. Offences to be cognizable. Section 6. Power to amend Schedule. Section 7. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Schedule 1.
